attention2.ptxt: Failure to use proper suspension fasteners or to perform proper maintenance / repair of suspension components can cause unsafe operating conditions.

item.ptxt: Replace suspension fasteners only with fasteners having the same part number or their equivalent. Do not use replacement parts of lesser quality or substitute design.
Observe the specified torque value for each fastener to assure proper retention of components.
Never try to repair any suspension part using heating, quenching, or straightening. Instead, replace the part with a new one.
